## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SentinelOne and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, vulnerability database progress, and AI visibility updates.](https://fathom.video/share/HKsJdZc1xptysFyF9t1oYV8f375cBhTu?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Vulnerability database design finalization in progress; filtering logic and UX to be determined](https://fathom.video/share/HKsJdZc1xptysFyF9t1oYV8f375cBhTu?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)
  - [Content publishing process clarified; SentinelOne to handle publishing in Content Stack](https://fathom.video/share/HKsJdZc1xptysFyF9t1oYV8f375cBhTu?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [AI visibility increased by 30% over 12 weeks; SentinelOne outperforming competitors](https://fathom.video/share/HKsJdZc1xptysFyF9t1oYV8f375cBhTu?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Looker dashboard combining GA4 and GSC data to be prepared for next week](https://fathom.video/share/HKsJdZc1xptysFyF9t1oYV8f375cBhTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
